title: sprayDryer operation
description: Single-stage rotary-atomiser spray dryer producing powder and exhaust air. Computes the exhaust temperature, droplet and particle sizes, transfer coefficients and drying time from the energy balance, the Friedman rotary-disc correlation and Ranz-Marshall transfer. Requires a transport model in the thermoPackage.

wheelDiameter.title: Atomiser disc diameter
wheelDiameter.description: Diameter of the atomiser wheel; with the feed rate it sets the droplet size.

wheelSpeed.title: Atomiser disc speed
wheelSpeed.description: Rotational speed of the atomiser wheel; faster spinning gives smaller droplets (d32 ~ N^-0.6, Friedman correlation).

liquidViscosity.title: Feed liquid viscosity
liquidViscosity.description: Dynamic viscosity of the feed liquid, used in the atomisation correlation.

surfaceTension.title: Feed surface tension
surfaceTension.description: Surface tension of the feed liquid, used in the atomisation correlation.

spreadParameter.title: PSD spread (Rosin-Rammler n)
spreadParameter.description: Width of the powder particle-size distribution; the droplet sizes follow a Rosin-Rammler Q(d) = 1 - exp(-(d/d')^n), larger n giving a narrower spread.

chamberDiameter.title: Drying-chamber diameter
chamberDiameter.description: Diameter of the drying chamber; sets the gas superficial velocity v_gas = Q_gas/(pi D^2/4) and hence the residence time.

chamberHeight.title: Drying-chamber height
chamberHeight.description: Height the particle falls through; residence time = chamberHeight / particle fall velocity, which sets the residual moisture.

flow.title: Gas/droplet flow direction
flow.description: Co-current (v_particle = v_gas + v_terminal) or counter-current (v_particle = v_terminal - v_gas).
